heading: Commercial insulation demonstration program
label: 17242 Commercial insulation demonstration program
notes: Effective DateSection effective on the date that is 1 day after , see , set out as a note under , The Congress.Dec. 19, 2007section 1601 of Pub. L. 110–140section 1824 of Title 2

children.heading: Advanced insulation
children.label: 1 Advanced insulation
children.text: The term “advanced insulation” means insulation that has an R value of not less than R35 per inch.

children.label: C
children.text: commercial refrigerator, freezer, or refrigerator-freezer described in .section 6313(c) of this title
the state of technological advancement of advanced insulation; and
the projected amount of cost savings that would be generated by implementing advanced insulation into covered refrigeration units.

children.heading: Establishment
children.label: 1 Establishment
children.text: If the Secretary determines in the report described in subsection (b) that the implementation of advanced insulation into covered refrigeration units would generate an economically justifiable amount of cost savings, the Secretary, in cooperation with manufacturers of covered refrigeration units, shall establish a demonstration program under which the Secretary shall demonstrate the cost-effectiveness of advanced insulation.

children.heading: Disclosure
children.label: 2 Disclosure
children.text: The Secretary may, for a period of up to 5 years after an award is granted under the demonstration program, exempt from mandatory disclosure under (popularly known as the Freedom of Information Act) information that the Secretary determines would be a privileged or confidential trade secret or commercial or financial information under subsection (b)(4) of such section if the information had been obtained from a non-Government party.section 552 of title 5

children.heading: Cost-sharing
children.label: 3 Cost-sharing
children.text: shall apply to any project carried out under this subsection.Section 16352 of this title

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: d Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out this section $8,000,000 for the period of fiscal years 2009 through 2014.
